all.name: noura_wordmark_logo.png
issues: Leaf mark is simple and clear, but slightly generic in style.
Green color is not exactly #3FA45C (appears slightly off, more muted).
Edges are clean and crisp, but the logo mark and wordmark could be more tightly integrated for a more professional look.
No obvious AI artifacts, but overall design is somewhat basic and lacks unique brand character.

all.name: thumbnail_hero_still.png
issues: Slightly flat/dull color and cool/greenish cast is consistent with a real phone photo, not an AI artifact.
Subject is clearly present, centered, and in focus.
Hands and facial features appear natural and coherent.
Label on tub looks handwritten and plausible, not AI-distorted.
